# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: server-policy
spec:
  servers:
    - match:
        namespace: default
      allow:
        namespaces:
          - "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: authorization-policy
spec:
  peers:
    - match:
        namespace: default
      allow:
        namespaces:
          - "*"
---
apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdConfig
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
spec:
  proxy:
    noMtls: true
